name: @workflow/work-item-orchestration
description: 通用 work item 编排工作流：state/* 事实源 + 渲染 / 校验 / 提升 / 依赖图 / handoff 验证脚本

scripts.test: node --test scripts/render-board.test.mjs scripts/validate-state.test.mjs scripts/promote.test.mjs scripts/render-dependencies.test.mjs scripts/verify-handoff.test.mjs scripts/lint-redlines.test.mjs scripts/validate-config.test.mjs
